title: Senior Financial Analyst - NABARD - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - NABARD - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
We at NABARD are looking for an experienced Senior Financial Analyst based out of Ranchi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About NABARD:
NABARD is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NABARD!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
